steps.title: Read the intersection point from the graph
steps.content: The solution to a system is the point where the two graphs intersect. From the graph, the intersection is $\left(\frac{3}{2},0\right)$.

steps.title: Match the coordinates to the equations
steps.content: A system with solution $\left(\frac{3}{2},0\right)$ must have $x=\frac{3}{2}$ and $y=0$. That matches choice A.
